notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil strikes out swinging, catcher Tyler Heineman to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Lawrence Butler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler grounds out, second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Kazuma Okamoto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto grounds into a double play, second baseman Darell Hernaiz to shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Addison Barger out at 2nd. Kazuma Okamoto out at 1st.
